get.description: Retrieve aggregated store metrics including counts, revenue, and MRR. When startDate and endDate are provided, totals are filtered to that date range. When interval is also provided, the response includes a periods array with time-series data points grouped by that interval. The periods array starts from the store's first transaction or startDate, whichever is later, to avoid empty leading buckets. All monetary amounts are in cents (integer, no decimals).

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start of the date range as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds (e.g. 1740614400000). When provided with endDate, filters totals to this range. Required when interval is specified.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End of the date range as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds (e.g. 1772150400000). When provided with startDate, filters totals to this range. Required when interval is specified.

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: Groups time-series data into buckets of this size. Requires startDate and endDate. Returns a periods array with one entry per bucket containing grossRevenue and netRevenue.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

404.description: Not Found - Resource does not exist

info.title: Creem API
info.description: Creem is an all-in-one platform for managing subscriptions and recurring revenue, tailored specifically for today's SaaS companies. It enables you to boost revenue, enhance customer retention, and scale your operations seamlessly.

ApiKey.name: x-api-key
ApiKey.description: API key for authentication. You can find your API key in the Creem dashboard under Settings > API Keys.

ProductFeatureType.description: The type of the feature: privateNote (custom note), file (downloadable files), or licenseKey (license key).

description.description: A brief description of the feature.

ProductBillingType.description: Indicates the billing method for the customer. It can either be a `recurring` billing cycle or a `onetime` payment.

TaxMode.description: Specifies the tax calculation mode for the transaction. If set to "inclusive," the tax is included in the price. If set to "exclusive," the tax is added on top of the price.

TaxCategory.description: Categorizes the type of product or service for tax purposes. This helps determine the applicable tax rules based on the nature of the item or service.

max_length.description: Maximum character length constraint for the input.

minimum_length.description: Minimum character length requirement for the input.

label.description: The markdown text to display for the checkbox.

value.description: The value of the checkbox (checked or not).

key.description: Unique key for custom field. Must be unique to this field, alphanumeric, and up to 200 characters.

label.description: The label for the field, displayed to the customer, up to 50 characters

optional.description: Whether the customer is required to complete the field. Defaults to `false`.

object.description: String representing the object's type. Objects of the same type share the same value.

description.description: A brief description of the product
description.example: This is a sample product description.

image_url.description: URL of the product image. Only png as jpg are supported

price.description: The price of the product in cents. 1000 = $10.00

currency.description: Three-letter ISO currency code, in uppercase. Must be a supported currency.

product_url.description: The product page you can redirect your customers to for express checkout.

default_success_url.description: The URL to which the user will be redirected after successfull payment.

custom_fields.description: Custom fields configured for the product. Collect additional information from your customer during checkout.

updated_at.description: Last updated date of the product

total_records.description: Total number of records in the list

next_page.description: The next page number, or null if there is no next page

prev_page.description: The previous page number, or null if there is no previous page

ProductCurrency.description: Three-letter ISO currency code, in uppercase. Must be a supported currency.

ProductRequestBillingType.description: Indicates the billing method for the customer. It can either be a `recurring` billing cycle or a `onetime` payment.

ProductRequestBillingPeriod.description: Billing period, required if billing_type is recurring

max_length.description: Maximum character length constraint for the input.

min_length.description: Minimum character length requirement for the input.

label.description: The markdown text to display for the checkbox.
label.example: I agree to the [terms and conditions](https://example.com/terms)

key.description: Unique key for custom field. Must be unique to this field, alphanumeric, and up to 200 characters.

label.description: The label for the field, displayed to the customer, up to 50 characters.

optional.description: Whether the customer is required to complete the field. Defaults to `false`

price.description: The price of the product in cents

default_success_url.description: The URL to which the user will be redirected after successfull payment.

custom_fields.description: Collect additional information from your customer using custom fields during checkout. Up to 3 fields are supported.

custom_field.description: DEPRECATED: Use `custom_fields` instead. Collect additional information from your customer using custom fields during checkout. Up to 3 fields are supported.

abandoned_cart_recovery_enabled.description: Enable abandoned cart recovery for this product

object.description: String representing the object’s type. Objects of the same type share the same value.

country.description: The ISO alpha-2 country code for the customer.

updated_at.description: Last updated date of the product

object.description: String representing the object’s type. Objects of the same type share the same value.

product_id.description: The ID of the product associated with the subscription item.

price_id.description: The ID of the price associated with the subscription item.

units.description: The number of units for the subscription item.

SubscriptionCollectionMethod.description: The method used for collecting payments for the subscription.

SubscriptionStatus.description: The current status of the subscription.

TransactionType.description: The type of transaction. payment(one time payments) and invoice(subscription)

object.description: String representing the object's type. Objects of the same type share the same value.

amount_paid.description: The amount the customer paid in cents. 1000 = $10.00

currency.description: Three-letter ISO currency code, in uppercase. Must be a supported currency.

tax_country.description: The ISO alpha-2 country code where tax is collected.

tax_amount.description: The sale tax amount in cents. 1000 = $10.00

refunded_amount.description: The amount that has been refunded in cents. 1000 = $10.00

order.description: The order associated with the transaction.

subscription.description: The subscription associated with the transaction.

customer.description: The customer associated with the transaction.

period_start.description: Start period for the invoice as timestamp

period_end.description: End period for the invoice as timestamp

created_at.description: Creation date of the order as timestamp

object.description: String representing the object's type. Objects of the same type share the same value.

product.description: The product associated with the subscription.

customer.description: The customer who owns the subscription.

last_transaction_id.description: The ID of the last paid transaction.

last_transaction_date.description: The date of the last paid transaction.

next_transaction_date.description: The date when the next subscription transaction will be charged.

current_period_start_date.description: The start date of the current subscription period.

current_period_end_date.description: The end date of the current subscription period.

canceled_at.description: The date and time when the subscription was canceled, if applicable.

created_at.description: The date and time when the subscription was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time when the subscription was last updated.

discount.description: The discount code applied to the subscription, if any.

mode.description: The mode of cancellation (immediate or scheduled), default can be configured in the store billing settings.

onExecute.description: The action to execute when canceling (cancel or pause) when mode is scheduled, ignored when mode is immediate or not provided

id.description: The id of the item to update.

product_id.description: The ID of the product associated with the subscription item.

price_id.description: The ID of the price associated with the subscription item.

units.description: The number of units for the subscription item.

items.description: List of subscription items to update/create. If no item ID is provided, the item will be created.

update_behavior.description: The update behavior for the subscription (defaults to proration)

product_id.description: The ID of the product to upgrade to

update_behavior.description: The update behavior for the subscription (defaults to proration-charge-immediately)

OrderType.description: The type of order. This can specify whether it's a regular purchase, subscription, etc.

object.description: String representing the object's type. Objects of the same type share the same value.

customer.description: The customer who placed the order.

product.description: The product associated with the order.

transaction.description: The transaction ID of the order

discount.description: The discount ID of the order

amount.description: The total amount of the order in cents. 1000 = $10.00

sub_total.description: The subtotal of the order in cents. 1000 = $10.00

tax_amount.description: The tax amount of the order in cents. 1000 = $10.00

discount_amount.description: The discount amount of the order in cents. 1000 = $10.00

amount_due.description: The amount due for the order in cents. 1000 = $10.00

amount_paid.description: The amount paid for the order in cents. 1000 = $10.00

currency.description: Three-letter ISO currency code, in uppercase. Must be a supported currency.

fx_amount.description: The amount in the foreign currency, if applicable.

fx_currency.description: Three-letter ISO code of the foreign currency, if applicable.

fx_rate.description: The exchange rate used for converting between currencies, if applicable.

affiliate.description: The affiliate associated with the order, if applicable.

updated_at.description: Last updated date of the order

url.description: The URL to download the file.

type.description: The MIME type of the file.

size.description: The size of the file in bytes.

LicenseStatus.description: The current status of the license key.

object.description: A string representing the object’s type. Objects of the same type share the same value.

name.description: The name of the license instance.

status.description: The status of the license instance.

created_at.description: The creation date of the license instance.

object.description: A string representing the object’s type. Objects of the same type share the same value.

product_id.description: The ID of the product this license belongs to.

activation.description: The number of instances that this license key was activated.

activation_limit.description: The activation limit. Null if activations are unlimited.

expires_at.description: The date the license key expires. Null if it does not have an expiration date.

created_at.description: The creation date of the license key.

description.description: A brief description of the feature.
description.example: Get access to the full course materials.

private_note.description: Private note from the seller. This is only visible to the customer after purchase.
private_note.example: Thank you for your purchase! Here is your access code: XYZ123

file.description: File feature data containing downloadable files.

license_key.description: License key issued for the order.

license.description: DEPRECATED: Use `license_key` instead. License key issued for the order.

object.description: String representing the object's type. Objects of the same type share the same value.

request_id.description: Identify and track each checkout request.

product.description: The product associated with the checkout session.

units.description: The number of units for the of the product.

order.description: The order associated with the checkout session.

subscription.description: The subscription associated with the checkout session.

customer.description: The customer associated with the checkout session.

custom_fields.description: Additional information collected from your customer during the checkout process.

checkout_url.description: The URL to which the customer will be redirected to complete the payment.

success_url.description: The URL to which the user will be redirected after the checkout process is completed.

license_keys.description: License keys issued for the order.

feature.description: DEPRECATED: Use `license_keys` instead. Features issued for the order.

metadata.description: Metadata for the checkout in the form of key-value pairs

id.description: Unique identifier of the customer. You may specify only one of these parameters: id or email.

email.description: Customer email address. You may only specify one of these parameters: id, email.

request_id.description: Identify and track each checkout request.

product_id.description: The ID of the product associated with the checkout session.

units.description: The number of units for the order.

discount_code.description: Prefill the checkout session with a discount code.

customer.description: Customer data for checkout session. This will prefill the customer info on the checkout page.

custom_fields.description: Collect additional information from your customer using custom fields. Up to 3 fields are supported.

custom_field.description: DEPRECATED: Use `custom_fields` instead. Collect additional information from your customer using custom fields. Up to 3 fields are supported.

success_url.description: The URL to which the user will be redirected after the checkout process is completed.

metadata.description: Metadata for the checkout in the form of key-value pairs

instance_name.description: A label for the new instance to identify it in Creem.

instance_id.description: Id of the instance to deactivate.
Id of the instance to validate.

object.description: A string representing the object’s type. Objects of the same type share the same value.

status.description: The status of the discount (e.g., active, inactive).

code.description: The discount code. A unique identifier for the discount.

type.description: The type of the discount, either "percentage" or "fixed".

amount.description: The amount of the discount. Can be a percentage or a fixed amount.

currency.description: The currency of the discount. Only required if type is "fixed".

percentage.description: The percentage of the discount. Only applicable if type is "percentage".

expiry_date.description: The expiry date of the discount.

max_redemptions.description: The maximum number of redemptions allowed for the discount.

duration.description: The duration type for the discount.

duration_in_months.description: The number of months the discount is valid for. Only applicable if the duration is "repeating" and the product is a subscription.

applies_to_products.description: The list of product IDs to which this discount applies.

redeem_count.description: The number of times this discount has been redeemed.

DiscountType.description: The type of the discount, either "percentage" or "fixed".

CouponDurationType.description: The duration type for the discount.

code.description: Optional discount code. If left empty, a code will be generated.

amount.description: The fixed value for the discount. Only applicable if the type is "fixed".

currency.description: The currency of the discount. Only required if type is "fixed".

percentage.description: The percentage value for the discount. Only applicable if the type is "percentage".

expiry_date.description: The expiry date of the discount.

max_redemptions.description: The maximum number of redemptions for the discount.

duration_in_months.description: The number of months the discount is valid for. Only applicable if the duration is "repeating" and the product is a subscription.

applies_to_products.description: The list of product IDs to which this discount applies.

totalProducts.description: Total number of products in the store

totalSubscriptions.description: Total number of subscriptions within the queried date range

totalCustomers.description: Total number of customers within the queried date range

totalPayments.description: Total number of payments within the queried date range

totalRevenue.description: Total gross revenue in cents within the queried date range

totalNetRevenue.description: Total net revenue in cents within the queried date range (after fees and taxes)

netMonthlyRecurringRevenue.description: Net monthly recurring revenue in cents (after estimated fees)

monthlyRecurringRevenue.description: Gross monthly recurring revenue in cents

timestamp.description: Start of the period as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds (e.g. Monday of that week for weekly intervals)

grossRevenue.description: Gross revenue in cents for this period

netRevenue.description: Net revenue in cents for this period (after fees and taxes)

totals.description: Aggregated totals for the queried date range

periods.description: Time-series data points grouped by the requested interval. Only present when interval, startDate, and endDate are provided.
